Package noppes.npcs.api.entity

Interface IEnergyZone<T extends net.minecraft.entity.Entity>

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IEntity<T>
    public interface IEnergyZone<T extends net.minecraft.entity.Entity>
extends IEntity<T>
    Entity-level interface for zone entities (Hazard and Trap). Created via IEnergyHandler.createHazard() or createTrap(). Configure properties, then call spawn() to place in the world.

      • getDamageData

        INbt getDamageData()
        Get custom damage data for addon handler routing (e.g. DBC damage stats).
        Returns:
        the zone's damage configuration as NBT
